# File Selection Pagination


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

## create_file_selection_pagination

Factory function that creates a `Pagination` instance configured for
file selection in the transcription workflow. Displays files in a table
with radio buttons for selection.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/cj-mills/cjm-fasthtml-workflow-transcription-single-file/blob/main/cjm_fasthtml_workflow_transcription_single_file/media/file_selection_pagination.py#L92"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

>                                        _workflow_transcription_single_file.med
>                                        ia.scanner.MediaScanner,

>                                        content_id:Optional[str]=None, preview_
>                                        url_func:Optional[Callable[[int],str]]=
>                                        None,
>                                        preview_target_id:Optional[str]=None)

*Create a Pagination instance for file selection with radio buttons.*
